zh.West Bretton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Dromsfield於1278年出生在英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓時，他的父親John Dromsfield28歲，母親Cecillia24歲。他於1295年與Joan DeStainton在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年10月在英國英格蘭越可爾享年37歲。

zh-hans.West Bretton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Dromsfield于1278年出生在英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓时，他的父亲John Dromsfield28岁，母亲Cecillia24岁。他于1295年与Joan DeStainton在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年10月在英国英格兰越可爾享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dromsfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dransfield
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Dronfield in Derbyshire, recorded in the Domesday Book as Dranefeld, from OE drān ‘drone’ + feld ‘open land’, or perhaps from Dransfield Hill in Mirfield, Yorkshire, although this name is more likely to derive from the surname than vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Dromsfield was born in 1278, in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Dromsfield, was 28 and his mother, Cecillia, was 24. He married Joan DeStainton in 1295, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in October 1315, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Dromsfield est né en 1278, à West Bretton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Dromsfield, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Cecillia, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan DeStainton en 1295, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en octobre 1315, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Dromsfield 1278 in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Dromsfield 28 und seine Mutter Cecillia 24. Er hat 1295 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Joan DeStainton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Oktober 1315 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Dromsfield è nato il nel 1278 nel West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John Dromsfield, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Cecillia, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan DeStainton nel 1295, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel ottobre 1315, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Dromsfieldが1278年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト ブレットオンで生まれた時，父John Dromsfieldは28歳，母Cecilliaは24歳であった。1295年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan DeStaintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1315年10月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Dromsfield(이)가 1278년 영국 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Dromsfield(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecillia(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Joan DeStainton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Dromsfield nasceu em 1278, em West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Dromsfield, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Cecillia, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan DeStainton em 1295, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1315, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Dromsfield родился в 1278 г. в местности вест бреттон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Dromsfield было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecillia, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan DeStainton в 1295 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер октябрь 1315 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Dromsfield nació en 1278, en West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Dromsfield, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Cecillia, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan DeStainton en 1295, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en octubre de 1315, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
